**Summary:** The 'Grand Bargain Tour Of USA with Orlando and Bahamas Cruise (Summer 2024)' package is an 18-day tour covering San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Niagara Falls, Harrisburg, Washington D.C., New Jersey, Orlando, and the Bahamas. The itinerary includes visits to San Francisco Bay Cruise, Solvang, Danish Village, Santa Monica Beach, Universal Studios, Hollywood Boulevard, Las Vegas High Roller, Niagara Falls, Hershey's Chocolate World, Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, Swami Narayan Temple, Statue of Liberty, SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory, Times Square, Epcot at Walt Disney World, and the Kennedy Space Centre Visitors Complex. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to San Francisco
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of San Francisco: See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks.

**Day 2:** San Francisco
- Proceed for a guided city tour of San Francisco: Visit the Golden Gate Bridge and see the famous Alcatraz Island.
- Enjoy San Francisco Bay Cruise.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles
- Drive to Los Angeles and visit Solvang - "A little Denmark in Southern California".
- Visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Los Angeles: Visit the Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars.
- Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more.

**Day 5:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas and visit the Las Vegas High Roller – one of the world’s largest observation wheel.
- Explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Las Vegas: Visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks!
- Visit the Majestic Grand Canyon –Open Bus tour to experience Las Vegas by Night.

**Day 7:** Niagara Falls
- Fly to Buffalo and drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel.
- Visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 8:** Niagara Falls
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Niagara Falls: Visit the Maid of the Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder.

**Day 9:** Harrisburg
- Drive to Harrisburg and visit Hershey’s Chocolate World a place to experience the chocolate making adventure.
- Visit the Smithsonian National Natural History Museum.

**Day 10:** Washington D.C.
- Proceed to Washington D.C. and visit the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Washington D.C.

**Day 11:** New Jersey
- Drive to New York City and visit the Swami Narayan Temple with Lunch.
- Guided tour of New York City: See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.

**Day 12:** New Jersey
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Manhattan, drive past Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, Central Park and many more sights.
- Ramp up the romance and magic on your trip to NYC with a carriage ride around Central Park.

**Day 13:** Orlando
- Proceed to the Airport for your flight to Orlando.
- On arrival, proceed to the hotel for check-in. Rest of the day is free for you to explore this city on your own.

**Day 14:** Orlando
- Proceed to Visit the popular Walt Disney’s Epcot - It’s the ultimate mix of futuristic technology and entertainment.
- Enjoy the various rides and shows.

**Day 15:** Orlando
- Proceed to the Kennedy Space Centre’s Visitors Complex of National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
- Visit space exploration, space shuttle simulators, enjoy 3D shows at IMAX Theater and see Space shuttle Atlantis up close.

**Day 16:** Bahamas Cruise
- Get set to board your cruise liner - Set sail for the Bahamas! Departure Time: 16:00 hrs.
- Enjoy your stay in the Ocean View cabins.

**Day 17:** Bahamas Cruise
- Proceed to visit the Coco Cay Island!
- Enjoy the luxury onboard the cruise or explore the many shore activities which the cruise has to offer or just play and relax on the Coco Cay Island beach.

**Day 18:** Bahamas Cruise
- Proceed to enjoy entertainment onboard.
- Arrive into Nassau the historic and beautiful island. You can either join the several optional shore excursions or just walk along the ‘Bay Street’ and explore shopping.

**Day 19:** Bahamas Cruise
- Bid farewell Departure Time: 07:00 hrs. (Ship time)
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Day 1:** Arrival in Kolkata, Embarkation (L/D)
- Arrive in Kolkata and embark on the Antara Luxury River Cruise.
- Visit the historic sites of Kolkata, including the Writer's Building, General Post Office, and St. John's Church.
- Enjoy a welcome reception and dinner onboard.

**Day 2:** Tamluk – Gangasagar (B/L/D)
- Visit the ancient port city of Tamluk and explore its archaeological remains.
- Take a country boat ride to Gangasagar, a highly revered Hindu pilgrimage site.
- Enjoy a cultural performance and dinner onboard.

**Day 3:** Ganga Sagar – Namkhana – Bali (B/L/D)
- Cruise along the river to the fishing port of Namkhana.
- Visit the Sundarbans National Park and enjoy a talk and interaction with the Naturalist.
- Enjoy a dance and drama cultural program performed by the local tribals.

**Day 4:** Bali – Nethidopani – Bali (B/L/D)
- Visit the serene Nethidopani Forest Camp and experience the spectacular nature of the surroundings.
- Enjoy a walk in Bali Village and interact with the villagers engaged in creating handicrafts.
- Visit a local home and learn about the community's way of life.

**Day 5:** Dobanki – Namkhana (B/L/D)
- Cruise through the mangroves to further explore the Sundarbans.
- Visit the fishing port of Namkhana and observe the chaos.
- Enjoy a tea tasting session and reminisce about the wondrous experience of the Sundarbans.

**Day 6:** Namkhana – Kolkata (B/L/D)
- Sail back to Kolkata, enjoying breakfast and lunch onboard.
- Enjoy a farewell dinner and tea tasting event.

**Day 7:** Kolkata Disembark (B)
- Disembark after breakfast and proceed for your onward journey.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodations in luxury rooms onboard the Antara Luxury River Cruise.
- Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner.
- Excursion amenities: Transfers to/from jetty, shore excursion program series, shoe cleaning, welcome drink and cold towel service, individual VOX listening devices, and private motor coach.
- Included dining and entertainment: Expertly trained culinary team, complimentary Indian brand mineral water, tea, coffee, fruit juices, and soft drinks, cultural performances, educational talks, cooking classes, movie shows, and ship tour.
- Spacious air-conditioned lounge, indoor board games, and books to read in the lounge.

**Exclusions:**

- Taxes GST, subject to revision.
- Airfare to/from destination.
- Specialty coffees, wines, beer, and spirits.
- Shipboard gratuities.
- Insurance.
- All incidentals.

**Other Facilities (on chargeable basis):**

- Specialty coffees.
- Full service bar with Indian and imported liquor.
- Spa facilities.
- Boutique.
- Laundry.

**Summary:** The 'Adi Kailash Yatra' package is a 9-day tour covering Bhimtal, Pithoragarh, Dharchula, and Rudrapur. The itinerary includes visits to Bhimtal lake, Pithoragarh, Dharchula, and Rudrapur, with activities such as sightseeing, trekking, and visiting temples. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat rides, and visits to local markets. The tour also includes a visit to the Adi Kailash and Om Parvat, a sacred site for Hindus.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in New Delhi and drive to Bhimtal (270 Kms: 8 Hrs) (Altitude – 570 Mtrs)
- Arrive in New Delhi and drive to Bhimtal.
- Check in to the hotel and sightseeing of Bhimtal lake.
- Enjoy a boat ride at Bhimtal (Direct payment basis).
- Dinner and overnight at hotel.

**Day 2:** Bhimtal to Pithoragarh (200 Kms: 8 Hrs) (Altitude – 1627 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, check out from hotel and start your up hill journey to Pithoragarh.
- En-route to Pithoragarh visit Temple of Neem Karoli Baba at Kanchi Dham located on banks on river Kosi.
- After darshan and pooja, further drive for 80 Kms to reach Jageshwar Temple.
- Upon arrival, preform pooja at temple at the group of 125 Temples which is also a Jyotirlinga.
- Post pooja, enjoy your lunch at a nearby hotel in the lap of Nature.
- After having sumptuous lunch, drive 86 Kms and reach Pithoragarh.
- Upon arrival, check in at hotel.
- Rest of the evening is free to visit local market on foot.
- Dinner and overnight at hotel.

**Day 3:** Pithoragarh to Dharchula (95 Kms: 4 Hrs) (Altitude – 940 Mtrs)
- After early breakfast, drive to Dharchula.
- Upon arrival, complete your formalities for Inner line permits required for your onward trip.
- Later, check in at your guest house.
- Lunch at guest house.
- Rest of the day is free for exploring Dharchula and Nepal (Till 6 PM).
- At 7 PM in your guest house, assemble for tour briefing and meeting your guide for onward journey.
- Dinner and overnight stay at guest House.

**Day 4:** Dharchula to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji (90 Kms: 7 Hrs/75 Kms: 5 Hrs/72 Kms: 5 Hrs) (Altitude – 3700 Mtrs/3250 Mtrs/3200 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, proceed to your base camp of Adi Kailash.
- We shall change your vehicle on this day and you would be resuming your journey on 4x4 wheel drive vehicle.
- The journey is off-roading on the dirt tracks in this Himalayan region where a lot of road construction is happening.
- At Chialekh, get your Inner line permits checked at ITBP & Army posts.
- Your inner line permits would be checked at Budhi, Napalchu, Kuti villages.
- You would come across some beautiful landscapes of the region where you can take numerous photos for your lifetime memories.
- Lunch at Buddhi Village.
- Further drive enroute driving past Villages of Gabriyang, Napalchu.
- As you are reaching altitude beyond 3000 meters, your pace must be slow and steady.
- Upon arrival at your base, check in your camps/guest house and relax for the day for acclimatization.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/Home stay.

**Day 5:** Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji to Aum Parvat – Nabhi/Gunji/Kuti/Jollynkong (30 Kms: 2 Hrs One Way) (Altitude – 3220 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, drive for approx. 2 Hrs to reach Nabhidhang village and from here witness AUM parvat.
- The Village Nabhidhang is the last village on this road and is 30 Kms from Lipula Pass and beyond Lipula pass is China.
- On a clear weather, you can witness Kailash Parwat from Sela pass.
- After a spectacular view, return back to your base camp entoute visit Kali Mata Mandir, Vyas Gufa.
- Rest of the day is free to relax and enjoy some time in the Himalayas by meditating.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/home stay.

**Day 6:** Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji/Jollynkong to Adi Kailash to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji (20 Kms: 2 Hrs/65 Kms: 4 Hrs/68 Kms: 4 Hrs) (Altitude - 4770 Mtrs)
- This is the day that you embark on the JOURNEY OF LIFE TIME to witness Adi Kailash – ABODE OF SHIVA.
- After an early breakfast, commence your journey to reach village Jollykong enroute drive past Pandava Fort, Pandava Parvat, Parvati Mukut.
- From Jolly kong, the last road head from here you will start your pad yatra to Kailash Parvati temple, Parwati Sarovar.
- You can also do parikrama of the sarovar.
- The trek is approx. 4 Kms trek and further trek to Gaurikund and also witness Bhim ki Kethi.
- A lot of folk tales of the area will give you an insight of the valley.
- After your darshan, return back to base at Jollykong and drive to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/Home stay.

**Day 8:** Pithoragarh to Rudrapur (235 Kms:8 Hrs) (Altitude – 119 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, check out & drive to Rudrapur enroute visit Advaita Ashram.
- Later, drive to reach Rudrapraur.
- Check in at Hotel.
- Relax for the day at a luxurious Hotel before end of the trip.
- Dinner and Overnight stay.

**Day 9:** Rudrapur to New Delhi (Hrs 265 Kms: 7 Hrs)
- After breakfast, you are on your last lap of your journey.
- Drive back to your respective departure destination with pious memories of Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra.
